candidates.why: Represents operating revenue but there is a more standard total revenue line available with identical amounts.
Explicit total revenue line with values equal to operating revenue; best representation of top-line sales.
This appears to be a tax-related item, not revenue; inappropriate for REVT.
Financial income, not operating revenue; should not be used for REVT.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit Total Revenue line as the top-line figure.

candidates.why: Direct production costs; classic COGS line.
Personnel costs are a core SG&A component when not classified under COGS.
Typical SG&A bucket for overhead/administrative/selling expenses.
Represents share-based compensation, which is part of SG&A overhead.

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A total; using main overhead components and stock-based comp as SG&A components.

candidates.why: This is a tax credit related to R&D, not the R&D expense itself.
Directly labeled R&D expenses, matching the XRD definition, even if current preview values are nan.
EBIT is pre-interest and not an interest expense line.
Represents net interest income, not expense, and is positive; not ideal for XINT which wants interest expense.
Explicit net interest expense line aggregating interest costs; best fit for XINT.
Component of interest expense, but a subset of total net interest costs.
Minor component of interest expense; subset of total.
Component of interest expense; subset of total.
Lease-related interest component; subset of total interest expense.
Represents profit attributable to non-controlling shareholders, not interest.
Same as non-controlling interests; not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; component only.
Operating profit before interest; not an interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Change in interest-bearing debt (short and long)
candidates.why: Financing cash flow, not interest expense.
Would be a good candidate but appears with nan values in preview; however, income statement has a clear net interest expense line.

variables.notes: Chose the aggregate net interest expenses line rather than individual components.

candidates.row_label: Change in Tax Rate on Equity Posted PPA in Prior Years
candidates.why: Tax adjustment affecting equity, but not a balance sheet total equity figure; not suitable as book equity.

variables.notes: No proper total equity line is available in the provided candidates; BE will be treated as missing/zero.

candidates.why: Represents the share of profit attributable to non-controlling shareholders; matches minority interest concept best among candidates.
Duplicate concept/values as non-controlling interests; either could be used.

variables.notes: Selected the more modern terminology "Non-controlling interests" over the synonymous "Minority interests."
